headline: Can KDP Sustain Its Growth Amid Cost Pressures & Coffee Headwinds?

headline: Will Kraft Heinz's NFL Deal Strengthen Its Growth Recovery Plan?
summary: KHC's five-year NFL partnership aims to boost brand relevance, spark game-day demand and expand foodservice reach as it works to revive growth.

headline: Reese's Turns Busted Brackets into Sweet Wins with New March Madness® Initiative, Every Bracket Busts for a Reese's
summary: As a longtime NCAA partner, the brand Reese's is tipping off March Madness this year with "Every Bracket Busts for a Reese's," a fan program that turns the inevitable bracket heartbreak into a chance to win something way sweeter – Reese's cups or tickets to the NCAA Men's or Women's Final Four and championship games.

headline: Hershey combines salty, sweets units to accelerate growth
summary: The Reese’s maker also announced several leadership changes, including expanding the oversight of sweets head Andrew Archambault to include the full U.S. portfolio.
